title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people shopping at a supermarket. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A man and a young girl are shopping in a supermarket. The girl is putting a box into a trolley while the man is checking a shopping list. There are shelves of food on both sides of them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people flying a kite. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two children are flying a colourful kite in an open field. One child is holding the string and the other is running beside him. There is green grass, a blue sky and a few trees in the distance.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
